ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2005 Continued To Oct-11-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Deborah Honig, Esq. for Plaintiff: CCSF.
Plaintiff's witness: Adriana Oropeza, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Albert F. Vella as follows:
Damages $234,190.04
Costs $357.50, for a total of $234,547.54
Judgment signed in open court.

Motion For Reconsideration Imposition Of Sanctions And Revoke Jul.18,2005
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Imposition of Sanctions issued on 7/18/2005 to Robert L. Fletcher, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Diana Padilla, CSR 975. (212)
